channel.title: GDACS RSS information
channel.description: Near real-time notification about natural disaster with a potential humanitarian impact

item.title: Orange earthquake (Magnitude 5.3M, Depth:9.751km) in Bangladesh 27/02/2026 07:52 UTC, 60 thousand (in MMI>=VII).
item.description: On 2/27/2026 7:52:24 AM, an earthquake occurred in Bangladesh potentially affecting 60 thousand (in MMI>=VII). The earthquake had Magnitude 5.3M, Depth:9.751km.
item.dc:subject: EQ2
item.gdacs:severity: Magnitude 5.3M, Depth:9.8km

gdacs:resource.gdacs:title: Event in rss format
gdacs:resource.gdacs:description: Joint Research Center of the European Commission
gdacs:resource.gdacs:acknowledgements: Copyright European Union. Syndication allowed, provided the source is acknowledged.

item.title: Green notification for tropical cyclone URMIL-26. Population affected by Category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 0 (0.162 million in Tropical Storm).
item.description: From 26/02/2026 to 28/02/2026, a Hurricane/Typhoon > 74 mph (maximum wind speed of 139 km/h) URMIL-26 was active in SEPacific. The cyclone affects these countries: Vanuatu (vulnerability Medium). Estimated population affected by category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 0 (0.162 million in tropical storm).
item.dc:subject: TC1
item.gdacs:severity: Hurricane/Typhoon > 74 mph (maximum wind speed of 130 km/h)
item.gdacs:population: Population affected by Category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 0 (0.168 million in Tropical Storm)

gdacs:resource.gdacs:title: Event in rss format
gdacs:resource.gdacs:description: Joint Research Center of the European Commission
gdacs:resource.gdacs:acknowledgements: Copyright European Union. Syndication allowed, provided the source is acknowledged.

item.title: Green earthquake (Magnitude 5.7M, Depth:10km) in Russia 26/02/2026 04:59 UTC, 240 thousand in MMI III.
item.description: On 2/26/2026 4:59:03 AM, an earthquake occurred in Russia potentially affecting 240 thousand in MMI III. The earthquake had Magnitude 5.7M, Depth:10km.
item.dc:subject: EQ1
item.gdacs:severity: Magnitude 5.7M, Depth:10km

gdacs:resource.gdacs:title: Event in rss format
gdacs:resource.gdacs:description: Joint Research Center of the European Commission
gdacs:resource.gdacs:acknowledgements: Copyright European Union. Syndication allowed, provided the source is acknowledged.

item.title: Green forest fire notification in Ethiopia
item.description: On 26/02/2026, a forest fire started in Ethiopia, until 27/02/2026.
item.dc:subject: WF1
item.gdacs:severity: Green impact for forestfire in 5757 ha

item.title: Green earthquake (Magnitude 5.5M, Depth:72.12km) in Papua New Guinea 25/02/2026 11:14 UTC, 10 thousand in MMI V.
item.description: On 2/25/2026 11:14:02 AM, an earthquake occurred in Papua New Guinea potentially affecting 10 thousand in MMI V. The earthquake had Magnitude 5.5M, Depth:72.12km.
item.dc:subject: EQ1
item.gdacs:severity: Magnitude 5.5M, Depth:72.1km

gdacs:resource.gdacs:title: Event in rss format
gdacs:resource.gdacs:description: Joint Research Center of the European Commission
gdacs:resource.gdacs:acknowledgements: Copyright European Union. Syndication allowed, provided the source is acknowledged.

item.title: Volcanic eruption is on going for Ambae in Vanuatu
item.description: Volcano Ambae is emitting ash clouds according to the regional VAAC. The aviation alert level is Green.
item.dc:subject: VO1

item.title: Green flood alert in Chile
item.description: On 22/02/2026, a flood started in Chile, lasting until 24/02/2026 (last update). The flood caused 0 deaths and 60 displaced .
item.dc:subject: FL1
item.gdacs:severity: Magnitude 0

item.title: Green flood alert in Democratic Republic of Congo
item.description: On 22/02/2026, a flood started in Democratic Republic of Congo, lasting until 25/02/2026 (last update). The flood caused 1 deaths and 2533 displaced .

item.title: Green notification for tropical cyclone HORACIO-26. Population affected by Category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 0 (0 in Tropical Storm).
item.description: From 18/02/2026 to 25/02/2026, a Post-tropical Depression (maximum wind speed of 243 km/h) HORACIO-26 was active in SWIndian. The cyclone affects these countries: [unknown] (vulnerability [unknown]). Estimated population affected by category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 0 (0 in tropical storm).
item.dc:subject: TC1
item.gdacs:severity: Post-tropical Depression (maximum wind speed of 137 km/h)
item.gdacs:population: Population affected by Category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 0 (0 in Tropical Storm)

item.title: Green flood alert in Türkiye
item.description: On 07/02/2026, a flood started in Türkiye, lasting until 15/02/2026 (last update). The flood caused 0 deaths and 314 displaced .
item.dc:subject: FL1
item.gdacs:severity: Magnitude 0
